{{Quote|Hey Grinner, you sure know your way around a control panel.|Anonymous pirate|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Grinner''' was one of the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]] under the command of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] leader [[Zothip]]. He was responsible for patrolling the [[Kauron]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] base.

Grinner, Zothip, and several other pirates including [[Crans]], [[Portin]], and [[Control (individual)|Control]], sneaked into [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]]'s quarters on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Capital of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. Grinner didn't realize that they were being followed by the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] known as [[Karoly D'ulin]]. Once inside, Karoly killed Zothip. After Zothip's death, Control took over as the head of the Cavrilhu Pirates.
